reviews.comment:
Siempre buena atención tanto en los surtidores como en los servicios del ACA. Una lastima que no reabran la confitería porque era buena y barata.

(Translated by Google)
Always good service both at the pumps and in the ACA service centers. It's a shame they're not reopening the café because it was good and inexpensive.
